title: Implement GunState view API with type-safe get/set + hasState/clearState + error handling

reference_files.reason: Read/Write API - GunState complete method signatures (getInt/setInt/getLong/setLong/getDouble/setDouble/getFloat/setFloat/getBoolean/setBoolean/getString/setString/getUuid/setUuid/hasState/clearState), zero value + WARN on unregistered/type mismatch
Usage example and error handling - zero values for each type, WARN per-state per-minute rate limiting

acceptance_criteria: GunState class wraps ItemStack (gun) and provides type-safe state access
All 14 typed get/set methods implemented: getInt/setInt, getLong/setLong, getDouble/setDouble, getFloat/setFloat, getBoolean/setBoolean, getString/setString, getUuid/setUuid
hasState(ResourceLocation) returns true if state key exists with non-default value
clearState(ResourceLocation) removes state key (restores to default value)
Unregistered state ID: get returns zero value (0/0L/0.0/0.0f/false/""/null), WARN logged per-state per-minute (rate limited, no log spam)
Type mismatch (registered as int but read with getDouble): returns zero value, WARN logged per-state per-minute
setInt/setLong/etc. validate type matches registry definition before writing, WARN on mismatch (no write)
All set operations write through to GunData Data Component (create new immutable GunData, set to ItemStack)
GunState.getState(ItemStack) static factory method returns GunState instance
No exceptions thrown for unregistered/mismatch (graceful degradation only)
